channel.title: Chatbot on WANcatServer
channel.description: Recent content in Chatbot on WANcatServer

item.title: How to Handle Conversation in Chatbot in Python
item.description: When you develop a chatbot, sometimes for user experience, you cannot ask your user send messages like commands. For example, we want to build a guess number bot. We want the bot works like this: user: guess bot: From what number? user:: 25 bot: To what number? user: 100 bot: Guess a number between 25 to 100 user: 64 bot: too small user: 91 bot: too large …… user: 83
